channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Florida neighbors band together to recover after one-two punch from hurricanes Helene and Milton
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — When ankle-deep floodwaters from Hurricane Helene bubbled up through the floors of their home, Kat Robinson-Malone and her husband sent a late-night text message to their neighbors two doors down: “Hey, we're coming.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM and LAURA BARGFELD, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KREX 5

item.title: Deputies 'probably' prevented 3rd Trump assassination attempt, California sheriff says
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WFLA, NBC

item.title: FEMA makes 'operational adjustments' following safety concerns in North Carolina
item.description: NORTH CAROLINA, N.C. (WGHP) — FEMA has made operational adjustments in North Carolina following safety concerns while providing relief in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene. A FEMA spokesperson told FOX8 the following.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Ratliff, NewsNation

item.title: 50 Cent-themed escape room coming to Shreveport, Louisiana
item.description: The event is free, but you must sign up for a time slot during the library's "Fall into the West" festival or by calling (318) 635-0883. If you are age 16 and under, you must have an adult accompany you into the escape room.
item.dc:creator: Jaclyn Tripp, NewsNation

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nearly 200 miles of Blue Ridge Parkway reopens as long-term work remains in North Carolina
item.description: The Blue Ridge Parkway was closed indefinitely after Hurricane Helene swept through the region last month.
item.dc:creator: QCN Digital Staff, Fox 5

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Deputies 'probably' prevented 3rd Trump assassination attempt, California sheriff says
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WGN 9

item.title: Not exactly smooth sailing at the 52nd Albuquerque balloon fiesta after 4 incidents
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A drone show and a flawless mass ascension ended Sunday’s last day of the 52nd Albuquerque International Balloon Fiesta. But it wasn’t all smooth sailing for this year’s hot air balloon event.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What is the purpose of an open-front toilet seat?
item.description: Open-front toilet seats — or “U-shaped” seats — are common in public bathrooms or commercial spaces, but they’re almost never the norm in private residences.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Family desperately trying to get Colorado dad home after he fell ill on European cruise
item.description: A Colorado family is desperately trying to get their dad from Englewood home after a sudden and severe illness in Europe.
item.dc:creator: Kasia Kerridge, Fox 5

item.title: What you should do before and after your phone is stolen or lost
item.description: Phones hold so much of our digital lives — emails, social media and bank accounts, photos, chat messages and more — that if they ever get stolen or go missing, it can cause major disruption
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Video shows mechanical SpaceX arms catching Starship rocket booster back at the launch pad
item.description: SpaceX pulled off the boldest test flight yet of its enormous Starship rocket on Sunday, catching the returning booster back at the launch pad with mechanical arms.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden views Hurricane Milton damage in Florida
item.description: President Joe Biden on Sunday will survey the devastation inflicted on Florida's Gulf Coast by Hurricane Milton as he urges Congress to approve additional emergency disaster funding.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Walz tramps through tall grass but bags no birds as pheasant hunting season opens
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Democratic vice presidential candidate Tim Walz carried a shotgun and tramped through tall grass as Minnesota's pheasant hunting season opened, giving the campaign a chance to highlight the governor's rural roots and love of outdoor sports. Neither Walz nor Lt. Gov.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Clyburn says he's 'concerned' about Black men voting for Trump
item.description: Rep. James Clyburn (D-S.C.) said he is “concerned” that Black men will vote for former President Trump in the upcoming election — or sit it out entirely. “I am concerned about Black men staying home or voting for Trump,” Clyburn said Sunday on CNN’s “State of the Union.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Days left to claim cash in Oracle settlement that 'hundreds of millions' qualify for
item.description: The deadline is fast approaching for people to request a piece of the $115 million settlement fund Oracle agreed to pay out, settling claims it violated many people's privacy by selling their information to third parties.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Your Morning: Biden to visit Florida, 993k still without power
item.description: Welcome to the Your Morning newsletter featuring the latest news across America! It’s Oct. 13, 2024, and there’s a lot happening today.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Middle school cheerleaders suffer first and second degree burns after 'punishment' from coach
item.description: Thirteen cheerleaders at Evans Middle School in Lubbock, Texas are suffering from first and second-degree burns on their hands after coach punishes team.
item.dc:creator: Julianna Washburn, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Arkansas father arrested after allegedly killing man he found with his missing 14-year-old daughter
item.description: An Arkansas father was arrested after he allegedly shot and killed a man who he found in a vehicle with his missing 14-year-old daughter, according to the sheriff's office.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From the pulpit, Harris calls out Trump for hurricane misinformation. Biden surveys Florida's damage
item.description: Kamala Harris has used an appearance before a largely Black church audience in battleground North Carolina to call out Donald Trump for spreading misinformation about the federal government's hurricane response.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani And Josh Boak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Iowa mom's boyfriend nearly got away with murder — until a zipper changed everything
item.description: Dr. Michael Baden recounts how a nondescript zipper imprint helped prosecutors put Ivan "Sam" Brammer behind bars in the death of his girlfriend, Ilene Gowan, in a new Fox Nation show.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina’s mountains, the roar of gas-powered generators is both unpleasant and essential.
item.dc:creator: Gabriela Aoun Angueira, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Floridians cleaning up from Hurricane Milton are hampered by a widespread fuel shortage
item.description: CORTEZ, Fla. (AP) — Floridians recovering from Hurricane Milton, many of whom were journeying home after fleeing hundreds of miles to escape the storm, spent much of Saturday searching for gas as a fuel shortage gripped the state. In St.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY ONEIL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Kentucky woman arrested after dismembered body parts found 'cooked' inside oven
item.description: A witness told state police that she was reportedly "casting spells" and being "confrontational" the day prior to the discovery.
item.dc:creator: Jace O'Barto, NewsNation

item.title: FAA investigating Mesa Airlines flight from Austin to Houston
item.description: Mesa Airlines Flight 6078 left from Austin-Bergstrom International Airport on Wednesday, the FAA said.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Girtman, NewsNation

item.title: Rising chocolate prices impact Halloween candy choices
item.description: Despite rising chocolate and candy prices, Americans are expected to spend $3.5 million on Halloween sweets this year.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KTLA 5

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Philadelphia nurses struck by vehicle dropping off gunshot victim at hospital: police
item.description: A man dropping off a gunshot victim at a top Philadelphia hospital hit the 28-year-old victim and three nurses with a Jeep and fled on Saturday morning, police said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ronaldo scores again in Nations League win for perfect Portugal. Spain finds replacement for Rodri
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his record-extending 133rd international goal to keep Portugal perfect in the Nations League with a 3-1 win over Poland on Saturday, and Spain struck late to edge Denmark 1-0.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Far from where Hurricane Milton's eye hit, tornadoes wrought unexpected damage
item.description: Dozens of tornadoes spawned by Milton hit South Florida far from where the storm made landfall near Sarasota. One of them killed at least six people in Spanish Lakes Country Club Village near Fort Pierce, about an hour's drive north from Wellington.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT and CHRISTOPHER L. KELLER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mud, beer and cash: Annual wife-carrying championship attracts competitive couples to Maine
item.description: More than 30 couples competed in the North American Wife Carrying Championship, a 278-yard (254-meter) race during which contestants splash through water, leap over logs and trudge through mud — all while carrying their partner like a sack of potatoes.
item.dc:creator: ROBERT F. BUKATY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How schools are tackling misinformation as false claims about hurricanes, election run wild
item.description: Misinformation generally has been an increasing concern, most recently with how the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) has been responding to the aftermath of Hurricanes Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, ABC 4

item.title: Which states have the highest and lowest voter turnout in presidential elections?
item.description: The rate of voter turnout for the 2020 presidential election was around 67%. But some states were really bringing up that average.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: North Carolina governor blasts 'flat out lie' from Trump on disaster aid
item.description: "Trump’s lies and conspiracy theories have hurt the morale of first responders and people who lost everything, helped scam artists and put government and rescue workers in danger," said North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton’s winds topple crane that was building west Florida’s tallest residential tower
item.description: The mayor in St. Petersburg, Florida, warned residents that cranes at several construction projects across the city might fall in Hurricane Milton and at the storm's peak on Wednesday night, one came crashing down.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4
